overview: Gemini 3.5 Flash is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash line. Released 2026-05-19. Fast, cost-efficient mid-tier Gemini model balancing speed and intelligence.
What's notable in this version: Current Flash; frontier performance for agents/coding, ~4x faster than other frontier models.
